ability.name: Artifact Item Anvil
ability.desc: Drag this to the Shop to open an Armory full of Artifact items! You will have 30 seconds to choose.

ability.name: Support item anvil
ability.desc: Drag this to the Shop to open an Armory full of Support items! You will have 30 seconds to choose.

ability.name: Mercenary Chest
ability.desc: This chest stores all of the accumulated loot you've collected. Win a combat against a player to open it!

ability.name: Fish Frenzy
ability.desc:
Passive: For every @PercentMissingHealth@% missing Health, gain @ModifiedAS@% (%i:scaleAP%) Attack Speed

Active: Deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to the target, increased by @PercentBonusDamage*100@% if they're a tank.

ability.name: Tidal Slashes
ability.desc: Unleash a flurry of <TFTBonus>@TotalNumSlashes@ (%i:scaleAS%)</TFTBonus> slashes at the current target over @SlashDuration@ seconds, dealing <physicalDamage>@TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%)</physicalDamage> physical damage each.

ability.name: Gun Goddess Arsenal
ability.desc: Field Miss Fortune to choose whether she activates Channeler Mode, Challenger Mode, or Replicator Mode. The chosen mode determines her ability and her trait.

TFT17_MissFortuneSpell_FlexTraitStance.name: Replicator Mode
TFT17_MissFortuneSpell_FlexTraitStance.desc: Rain down bullets through a line of enemies, dealing <physicalDamage>@TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%)</physicalDamage> physical damage to each one, reduced by @DamageFalloff*100@% for each enemy hit.

TFT17_MissFortuneSpell_ManaTraitStance.name: Channeler Mode
TFT17_MissFortuneSpell_ManaTraitStance.desc: Channel a volley of bullets at the nearest two enemies for @Duration@ seconds, each dealing <physicalDamage>@ModifiedDamagePerSecond@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%)</physicalDamage> physical damage per second.

TFT17_MissFortuneSpell_ASTraitStance.name: Challenger Mode
TFT17_MissFortuneSpell_ASTraitStance.desc:
Fire a shot at the target that deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP) physical damage and ricochets to a nearby enemy, marking both. Enemies hit by the ricochet take @PassiveDamageRatio*100@% of the damage.

This Ability does @MarkedBonus*100@% more damage to marked enemies.

ability.name: Star Strike
ability.desc:
Reposition next to the target to strike the most enemies. Then throw @NumShurikens@ piercing kunai, each dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to the first enemy hit, reduced to @ModifiedSecondaryDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) for each subsequent target. Kunai remove @ArmorShred@ Armor, @ArmorShredCrit@ if they crit.

N.O.V.A. Strike: Slice all enemies, applying Wound and a bleed that deals @ModifiedNovaDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage each second. Kunai increase the damage of the bleed by @NovaShurikenBonusDamage*100@%.

ability.name: Ultra Friendly Object
ability.desc:
Summon a flying saucer over the current target that lasts @Duration@ seconds. Each second it deals @ModifiedDamagePerSecond@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to the target, plus @ModifiedSplitDamagePerSecond@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage split between all enemies within @SecondaryHexRange@ hex. The saucer deals @TankDamageIncrease*100@% increased damage to Tanks.

If an enemy under the UFO dies, Bard has a @AbductChance*100@% chance to abduct them and create a 1-star copy on your bench.

Meep bonus: On combat start, grant the nearest @ModifiedNumAllies@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%) Meeple allies an additional Meep.

Friends abducted: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Bard_FriendsAbducted@

ability.name: Explosive Attitude
ability.desc: Fire a barrage of <TFTBonus>@ModifiedNumRockets@ (%i:scaleAS%)</TFTBonus> rockets in a cone, each dealing <physicalDamage>@TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%)</physicalDamage> physical damage to the first target hit.

ability.name: Test of Spirit
ability.desc: Gain <TFTBonus>@ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%)</TFTBonus> Shield for @Duration@ seconds. Over the duration, drain <trueDamage>@ModifiedHealthDrain@ (%i:scaleAP%)</trueDamage> Health from the nearest @NumEnemies@ enemies. Then slam down, dealing <magicDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> magic damage to all enemies within 2 hexes.

ability.name: Hopped-Up Hacks
ability.desc:
Open a @SpellHexRadius@ hex rift containing the target, Hacking enemies within for @HexDuration@ seconds and dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to each, plus @ModifiedSplitDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage split between all enemies hit.

Hacked enemies store @HexPercent*100@% of all damage they take. When the Hack ends, they take true damage equal to the stored damage. The Hack ends early if it would kill the target.

ability.name: Perfect Bladework
ability.desc:
Passive: Every @NumAttacks@ attacks, reveal a Vital on the target. If a Vital exists, dash to attack it dealing @ModifiedVitalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) bonus true damage and heal for @PercentHealing*100@% of the damage dealt.

Active: Reveal @NumVitals@ Vitals on the target and quickly attack them all. If the target dies, remaining Vitals transfer to the nearest enemy. Upon striking the final Vital, create a two hex aura that heals allies within for @ModifiedHealing@ (%i:scaleAP%) over @AuraDuration@ seconds.

ability.name: Slingshot Maneuver
ability.desc:
Passive: Every 5th attack, launch a returning boomerang at the target that travels two hexes past the first enemy it hits. It deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage, reduced by @DamageReductionPerHit*100@% per hit.

Meep Bonus: @ModifiedNumMeeps@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%) Meeps attack alongside Gnar, dealing @ModifiedMeepDPS@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAS%) physical damage per second.

ability.name: Meep Bait
ability.desc:
Dash through the current target, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. Every third cast also summons a Mega Meep after a delay, briefly knocking the target up and dealing @ModifiedChompDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%%i:set14AmpIcon%) magic damage. Adjacent enemies take @SecondaryDamage*100@% damage.

Meep Bonus: Add @ModifiedNumMeeps@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%) Meep to the bait, increasing Mega Meep damage by @ModifiedMeepBonusDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%).

ability.name: Gravitational Spin
ability.desc:
Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. Then, strike enemies in a three hex line, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%%i:scaleArmor%) magic damage.

Meep Bonus: Reduce the damage of incoming attacks by @ModifiedFlatDR@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%). After being attacked @AttacksPerPassiveTrigger@ times, deal @ModifiedPassiveDamage@ (%i:scaleArmor%%i:set14AmpIcon%) magic damage in a two hex radius.

ability.name: Huddle Up!
ability.desc:
Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. For the duration, allies within two hexes gain @ModifiedResists@ (%i:scaleAP%) Armor and Magic Resistance.

Meep Bonus: Meeps grant @ModifiedMeepShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield to the nearest @ModifiedNumMeeps@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%) allies for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

TFT17_PoppySpellHero.name: Termeepnal Velocity
TFT17_PoppySpellHero.desc:
Summon a large Meep, then blast them towards the target dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleArmor%%i:set14AmpIcon%) physical damage to the first target hit. If this kills, the Meep ricochets to the closest enemy dealing the overkill damage.

Meep Bonus: Increase the Meep's size and damage by @ModifiedMeepBonus@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%)

ability.name: Asteroid Blaster
ability.desc:
Strafe to a nearby position, unleashing @BaseMissiles@ missiles split between the target and all enemies within two hexes. Missiles deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage with a @ProcChance@% Lucky chance of firing a mega missile that deals @ModifiedProcDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) instead.

Meep Bonus: Every @ModifiedMeepCooldown@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%) seconds, launch an Explosive Meep at the target, dealing @ModifiedMeepDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage in a one hex radius on impact.

Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

ability.name: Meepteor Shower
ability.desc:
Call down a Meepteor on the target that deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.

Meep Bonus: An additional @ModifiedMiniMeeps@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%) mini Meepteor are called down on nearby targets dealing @ModifiedMiniDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage each.

ability.name: Stellar Slash
ability.desc:
Heal @ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleAP%), then deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleArmor%) physical damage to the current target.

N.O.V.A. Strike: Cleave the battlefield, briefly knocking up all enemies and dealing @ModifiedNovaDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleArmor%) physical damage.

TFT17_AatroxSpell.name: Stellar Slash
TFT17_AatroxSpell.desc:
Heal @ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleAP%), then deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleArmor%) physical damage to the current target.

N.O.V.A. Strike: Cleave the battlefield, briefly knocking up all enemies and dealing @ModifiedNovaDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleArmor%) physical damage.

TFT17_AatroxSpellHero.name: Stellar Combo
TFT17_AatroxSpellHero.desc:
Rotate between three abilities:
Strike: Deal @ModifiedStrikeDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage.
Sweep: Deal @ModifiedSweepDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage in a cone and remove @ModifiedSweepArmor@ (%i:scaleAP%) Armor.
Slam: Deal @ModifiedSlamDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) in a one-hex radius around the target and briefly knock enemies up. If this only hits one enemy, deal @IsolationMultiplier*100@% damage.

N.O.V.A. Strike: Cleave the battlefield, briefly knocking up all enemies and dealing @ModifiedNovaDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage.

ability.name: Aim For The Head
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks have a @ProcChance@% Lucky chance to fire an empowered Headshot, dealing @ModifiedHeadshotDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage.

N.O.V.A. Strike: Mark all enemies, increasing damage taken by @NovaMarkDamageAmp*100@%. The first time marked targets drop below @NovaMarkThreshold*100@% Health, Headshot them for @ModifiedNovaHeadshotDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage.

Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

ability.name: Grasp of Convergence
ability.desc:
Passive: Gain @PassiveRatio*100@% more max Health from all sources.

Active: Converge an X-shape of vines on the target, dealing @DamageTotal@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to each enemy hit and Stunning them for @StunDuration@ seconds.

N.O.V.A. Strike: Send forth a wave of dragons that stun all enemies for @NovaStunDuration@ seconds. For the rest of combat, Maokai's attacks deal @ModifiedNovaDamage@ (%i:scaleHealth%) bonus physical damage.

ability.name: Cosmic Pursuit
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks and Abilities mark the target. When an enemy reaches @MaxMarks@ marks, Wolf consumes the marks, dealing @TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage.

Active: Jump up to @HexDistance@ hex away and fire arrows at the nearest @NumTargets@ targets, each dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage.

N.O.V.A. Strike: Gain @NovaDamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp. Now and every @NovaRepeatTimer@ seconds after, add a mark to all enemies.

ability.name: Bullet Cluster
ability.desc:
Passive: On takedown, gain @ManaPerKill@ mana.

Active: Fire @BaseNumMissiles@ missiles in a @HexRange@-hex radius around the current target, dealing @TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage each.

ability.name: Singularity
ability.desc: Gather the force of a black hole, dealing <magicDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> magic damage split between the target and the <scaleLevel>@NumEnemies@</scaleLevel> closest enemies to them. The target takes an additional <magicDamage>@ModifiedSecondaryDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> magic damage.

ability.name: Space Opera
ability.desc:
Passive: Jhin has a fixed attack speed of @FixedAS@ and converts every @PercentBonusASToConvert*100@% of bonus Attack Speed into @ADConversionRate@ bonus Attack Damage.

Active: Summon @NumHands@ spectral hands that fire alongside Jhin for the next @NumAttacks@ attacks. Each hand deals @TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage per shot. The final shots deal @FinalShotPercentDamageIncrease*100@% more damage and pierce through the most enemies in a line, dealing @PercentDamageReductionPerTargetHit*100@% reduced damage per target hit.

ability.name: Unstoppable Dreadnought
ability.desc:
Passive - Proximity Blast: Whenever an enemy enters a @ShotgunRange@ (%i:scaleRange%) hex radius, fire a blast in a cone towards the closest adjacent hex that deals @ModifiedShotgunDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage with @FalloffPerHex*100@% falloff per hex. Each adjacent hex has a @ShotgunCooldown@ second cooldown, and starts combat on cooldown.

Active: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds and reposition up to one hex to maximize the number of targets within Proximity Blast's radius. Reset Proximity Blast's cooldowns.

TFT17_UrgotSpell_Transformed.name: Armageddon
TFT17_UrgotSpell_Transformed.desc:
Passive - Mortar Rounds: Attacks are @AttackSpeedPenalty*100@% slower and generate double mana. They deal @ModifiedBasicAttackDamage@ (%i:TFTBaseAD%) physical damage, plus @PassivePercentSplashDamage*100@% to adjacent enemies.

Passive - Proximity Blast: Whenever an enemy enters a @ShotgunRange@ (%i:scaleRange%) hex radius, fire a blast in a cone towards the closest adjacent hex that deals @ModifiedShotgunDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage with @FalloffPerHex*100@% falloff per hex. Each adjacent hex has a @ShotgunCooldown@ second cooldown, and starts combat on cooldown.

Active: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds and reposition up to one hex to maximize the number of targets within Proximity Blast's radius. Reset Proximity Blast's cooldowns.

ability.name: Deathbeam
ability.desc: Channel a deathbeam in a line towards the current target for @Duration@ seconds. It deals <magicDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> magic damage per second, reduced by @DamageReductionPerTarget*100@% per enemy it passes through. Deathbeam ignores @MagicPen*100@% of the enemy's Magic Resist.

TFT17_AurelionSolSpell_Transformed.name: Mobilize the Fleet
TFT17_AurelionSolSpell_Transformed.desc:
Passive: Fly around the battlefield immune to crowd control. Every 0.75 seconds, gain @ModifiedManaPerFighter@ (%i:scaleAS%) Mana and launch a fighter that deals @ModifiedFighterDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to a nearby enemy.

Active: Gain @Shield@ Shield and activate Overdrive for @Duration@ seconds. While in Overdrive gain @SpellMovementSpeedMod*100@% movement speed, launch @OverdriveFighterPercentModifier@ times as many fighters, and ignore @MagicPen*100@% of enemy Magic Resistance.

ability.name: Gravity Matrix
ability.desc: Enter a defensive stance for @DurabilityDuration@ seconds gaining <TFTBonus>@Durability*100@% </TFTBonus>Durability. While in the defensive stance, attract nearby enemy projectiles and heal <scaleHealth>@ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleAP%)</scaleHealth> over the duration. When this ends, release a shockwave that deals <physicalDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%)</physicalDamage> as physical damage in a @HexRange@-hex range.

TFT17_GalioMechaSpell.name: Heavenbreaker
TFT17_GalioMechaSpell.desc:
Enter a defensive stance for @DurabilityDuration@ seconds, gaining @Durability*100@% Durability, healing @ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleAP%), and attracting nearby enemy projectiles.

As the stance ends, deal @ModifiedSwipeDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage in a @HexRange@-hex range. Then slam down in a line towards the current target, dealing @ModifiedLineDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to all enemies hit, and creating a shockwave that deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%) physical damage in a @HexRange@-hex range

ability.name: Psionic Storm
ability.desc: Channel a one-hex psionic storm that follows enemies for @Duration@ seconds. Each second, it grows larger and deals <magicDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> magic damage to enemies within, reduced by @FalloffPerHex*100@% per hex from the epicenter.

ability.name: Marked for Death
ability.desc: Reposition up to one hex to throw a harpoon at the furthest enemy. The harpoon pulls the first enemy hit one hex forward and deals <physicalDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</physicalDamage> physical damage. Then, teleport behind them and cleave, dealing <physicalDamage>@ModifiedTargetDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%)</physicalDamage> physical damage to them and <physicalDamage>@ModifiedAreaDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%)</physicalDamage> physical damage to nearby enemies.

TFT17_PykeSpellCarry.name: Contract Killer
TFT17_PykeSpellCarry.desc:
Passive: Your team's takedowns have a @ModifiedGoldChance@ (%i:scaleAP%) chance to generate a gold, increased to @PykeKillGoldChance*100@% if Pyke lands the killing blow.

Active: Dive towards the lowest Health enemy within @HexSearchRange@ hexes and slash in an X, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to the target, increased by @TankDamageIncrease*100@% against Tanks. All other enemies struck take @ModifiedAreaDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage. If this kills an enemy, immediately cast again at @ReducedDamage*100@% damage.

ability.name: Psi Strikes
ability.desc:
Passive: Every third attack is a doubleslash that deals @ModifiedPassiveDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) bonus physical damage.

Active: After brief meditation, enter a Psi-State for @Duration@ seconds, gaining @Omnivamp*100@% Omnivamp, @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed, and increased movement speed. Twice a second, fire a psychic projection at a random nearby enemy that deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage

ability.name: Chemical Rage
ability.desc:
Heal @ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) over @Duration@ seconds. Then, deal @DamageTotal@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to target and enemies adjacent to them and @ASSlow*100@% Chill them for @CCDuration@ seconds.

{{TFT_Keyword_Chill}}

TFT17_GragasSpellHero.name: Self Destruct
TFT17_GragasSpellHero.desc:
Self detonate, sacrificing @ModifiedHealthCost@ (%i:scaleHealth%) Health to deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%%i:scaleHealth%) magic damage in a three hex radius, reduced by @MultFalloffPerHex*100@% per hex from the epicenter.

(Sacrifice will not reduce Health below 1)

ability.name: Double Time
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal @ModifiedHitDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) bonus magic damage and an additional @ModifiedMagicDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) stacking magic damage over @PoisonDuration@ seconds. While an enemy has @GrooveStacks@ or more stacks, Teemo is in {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}}.

Active: Gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed for @ActiveAttacks@ attacks.

ability.name: Groovin' Susan
ability.desc: Transform for @Duration@ seconds, temporarily gaining <scaleLevel>@MaxHealth@</scaleLevel> max Health, entering {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}}, and dealing <magicDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> magic damage to adjacent enemies each second.

TFT17_NasusSpellHero.name: Bonk!
TFT17_NasusSpellHero.desc:
Passive: On takedown, enter {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for @ModifiedGrooveDuration@ (%i:scaleAP%) seconds.

Active: Deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) to the target. If this kills, permanently increase the damage of this ability by @BonusDamagePerKill@. (Current Bonus: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_NasusHeroBonusDamage@)

ability.name: Dance n' Dice
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal magic damage. Gwen is in {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} while targeting an enemy below @GrooveThreshold*100@% Health.

Active: Dash to a nearby hex to snip the lowest percent Health enemy, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to the target and @ModifiedAreaDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to enemies in a cone. If this kills, dash and snip again at @ResetDamage*100@% damage!

ability.name: Jump and Jive
ability.desc:
Passive: Whenever an enemy is knocked up, shoot them, dealing @ModifiedPassiveDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage and entering {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for @GrooveDuration@ seconds.

Active: Unleash a volley of bullets at the target, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage and knocking up for @StunDuration@ seconds.

ability.name: Disco Inferno
ability.desc:
Passive: On combat start, forge a temporary completed item. If 3 items are already equipped, a random completed item becomes Radiant this combat instead.

Active: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds, then breath fire in a cone dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. After any Shield on Ornn expires, Ornn enters {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for @GrooveDuration@ seconds.

ability.name: Bubble Pop
ability.desc: Toss a disco bubble at the target that deals <magicDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> split between enemies in a one hex radius. The explosion sends @NumProjectiles@ globs towards nearby enemies that deal <magicDamage>@ModifiedFirstBounceDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> magic damage. On cast, Nami enters {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for @GrooveDuration@ seconds.

ability.name: Party Crasher
ability.desc:
Passive: Every @BoltCooldown@ seconds, call down a bolt on the highest Health nearby enemy that deals @ModifiedBoltDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.

Active: Summon a disco ball at the largest clump of enemies, then knock up the current target into it, dealing @ModifiedUppercutDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. They crash down into the disco ball, dealing @ModifiedExplosionDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage in a three hex radius. Enter {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for @GrooveDurationPerTarget@ second per enemy hit.

ability.name: Psionic Crush
ability.desc:
Hurl a chunk of magnetic debris at the nearest target without one, dealing @ModifiedDebrisDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage and sticking it to them. If an enemy with debris dies, it passes to the nearest enemy without one.

Every @NumCasts@ casts, instead rip off all debris dealing @ModifiedDebrisRipDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage, then crush all the debris onto the target, dealing @ModifiedSlamDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage and briefly stunning them.

ability.name: Fate's Gambit
ability.desc:
Draw a card with a value between 1 and 9 by Lucky chance, then throw it at the target. Based on the card drawn, deal between @ModifiedDamageMin@ (%i:scaleAP%) and @ModifiedDamageMax@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. Overkill damage bounces to the nearest enemy.

3-Star Bonus: If a 9 is thrown, generate 1 gold.

Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

ability.name: Diviner's Judgment
ability.desc: Stab the target, causing them to bleed for <physicalDamage>@ModifiedBleedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%)</physicalDamage> physical damage over @BleedDuration@ seconds. After the attack, leap to the highest percent Health enemy within @HexDistance@ hexes.

ability.name: Counter Star-ike
ability.desc: Enter a defensive stance for @Duration@ seconds, reducing incoming damage by <TFTBonus>@ModifiedFlatDR@ (%i:scaleAP%)</TFTBonus> and gaining <TFTBonus>@ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%)</TFTBonus> Shield. When the stance ends, strike all nearby enemies, dealing <magicDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%)</magicDamage> magic damage and Stunning them for <scaleLevel>@StunDuration@</scaleLevel> second(s).

TFT17_JaxSpellHero.name: Reach for the Stars
TFT17_JaxSpellHero.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal @ModifiedBonusDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) bonus magic damage.

Active: Bash the target dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage and granting @ASandMS*100@% stacking Attack Speed and Movement Speed for the rest of combat.

ability.name: It's Raining Stars
ability.desc:
Passive: Gain a different secondary effect each game based on the Stargazer constellation.

Active: Call down something from the sky, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to @NumEnemies@ nearby enemies and do some special effect based on this game's Stargazer Constellation.

TFT17_LuluSpell_TrueDamageVariant.name: It's Raining Rocks!
TFT17_LuluSpell_TrueDamageVariant.desc:
Passive: Gain a different secondary effect each game based on the Stargazer constellation.

Active: Call down rocks from the sky, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to @NumEnemies@ nearby enemies, briefly Stunning them and dealing @ModifiedTrueDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) additional true damage.

TFT17_LuluSpell_PctHealthVariant.name: It's Raining Steak!
TFT17_LuluSpell_PctHealthVariant.desc:
Passive: Gain a different secondary effect each game based on the Stargazer constellation.

Active: Call down steak from the sky, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to @NumEnemies@ nearby enemies, and dealing @HealthRatio*100@% of their Health as bonus physical damage.

TFT17_LuluSpell_ShredVariant.name: It's Raining Flasks!
TFT17_LuluSpell_ShredVariant.desc:
Passive: Gain a different secondary effect each game based on the Stargazer constellation.

Active: Call down flasks from the sky, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to @NumEnemies@ nearby enemies, and removing @MRShred@ Magic Resistance from enemies within 1 hex of each of them.

TFT17_LuluSpell_ShieldVariant_BounceMis.name: Ebb and Flow
TFT17_LuluSpell_ShieldVariant_BounceMis.desc: Nami launches a stream of water at her target that bounces up to @BounceCount@ additional targets, prioritizing low Health targets and alternating between enemies and allies. Enemies hit take @ModifiedDamage@ magic damage and allies hit heal for @ModifiedHealing@.

TFT17_LuluSpell_MoreDamageVariant.name: It's Raining Fish!
TFT17_LuluSpell_MoreDamageVariant.desc:
Passive: Gain a different secondary effect each game based on the Stargazer constellation.

Active: Call down fish from the sky, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to @NumEnemies@ nearby enemies and @ModifiedBounceDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) additional magic damage to @NumEnemies@ other enemies.

TFT17_LuluSpell_WoundVariant.name: It's Raining Arrows!
TFT17_LuluSpell_WoundVariant.desc:
Passive: Gain a different secondary effect each game based on the Stargazer constellation.

Active: Call down arrows from the sky, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to @NumEnemies@ nearby enemies, applying @TooltipWoundPct@% Wound and causing enemies to take @DamageIncrease*100@% more damage for @Duration@ seconds.

Wound: Reduce Healing Received

TFT17_LuluSpell_ShieldVariant.name: It's Raining Totems!
TFT17_LuluSpell_ShieldVariant.desc:
Passive: Gain a different secondary effect each game based on the Stargazer constellation.

Active: Call down totems from the sky, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to @NumEnemies@ nearby enemies, and applying @ASSlow*100@% Slow to them for @ChillDuration@ seconds.

{{TFT_Keyword_Chill}}

TFT17_LuluSpell_GoldVariant.name: It's Raining Coins!
TFT17_LuluSpell_GoldVariant.desc:
Passive: Gain a different secondary effect each game based on the Stargazer constellation.

Active: Call down coins from the sky, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to @NumEnemies@ nearby enemies, and every @NumCasts@ casts drops @NumGold@ gold. (Casts Remaining: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Lulu_GoldVariant_CastsRemaining@)

(Total Gold Gained: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Lulu_GoldVariant_CoinsGenerated@)

TFT17_LuluSpell_HealVariant.name: It's Raining Steak!
TFT17_LuluSpell_HealVariant.desc:
Passive: Gain a different secondary effect each game based on the Stargazer constellation.

Active: Call down steak from the sky, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to @NumEnemies@ nearby enemies and healing @NumEnemies@ allies for @ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleAP%).

TFT17_LuluSpell_HealVariant_BounceMis.name: Ebb and Flow
TFT17_LuluSpell_HealVariant_BounceMis.desc: Nami launches a stream of water at her target that bounces up to @BounceCount@ additional targets, prioritizing low Health targets and alternating between enemies and allies. Enemies hit take @ModifiedDamage@ magic damage and allies hit heal for @ModifiedHealing@.

ability.name: Calamity
ability.desc: Gain <TFTBonus>@ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%)</TFTBonus> Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. Summon an astrolabe to crash down on a nearby hex, dealing <magicDamage>@ModifiedInitialDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> magic damage to enemies within 2 hexes. Then, push the astrolabe towards the end of the board, dealing <magicDamage>@ModifiedFollowupDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> magic damage. All enemies hit by the astrolabe are knocked up for @StunDuration@ seconds.

ability.name: Lend Me a Hand, Shadow!
ability.desc:
Passive: Every time Vex attacks, Shadow strikes a nearby enemy, dealing @ModifiedShadowHandDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. Whenever an enemy is struck @NumStrikesForPassive@ times by Shadow, Shadow strikes them again.

Active: Shadow launches @NumActiveStrikes@ empowered strikes, dealing @ModifiedShadowHandMagicDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage instead.

TFT17_VexSpell_Frontline.name: Five O'Clock Shadow
TFT17_VexSpell_Frontline.desc:
Wind up an enlarged punch towards the biggest clump of enemies within @TooltipNumHexes@ hexes, regaining @ModifiedHealthGain@ (%i:scaleHealth%) Health over @Duration@ second. The impact deals @ModifiedFistDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) to each enemy in the area, plus @ModifiedSplitDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) split between them. Enemies hit are @TooltipShredAmount@% Shredded for @ShredDuration@ seconds.

Shred: Reduce Magic Resist

ability.name: Time Warp
ability.desc:
Passive: This Ability adapts to Attack Damage or Ability Power, whichever is higher. Attacks deal @ModifiedPassiveAPDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic@ModifiedPassiveADDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage.

Active: Dash to a nearby hex, gaining @Shield@ Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds and slashing adjacent enemies for @ModifiedAPDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic@ModifiedADDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage. Every third cast, leap into the air and launch a wave of energy that deals @ModifiedAPWaveDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic@ModifiedADWaveDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to enemies in a line.

ability.name: Reality Tear
ability.desc:
Passive: On cast, attacks gain @ModifiedBonusDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) stacking bonus magic damage. Starting from the third cast, gain true damage instead.

Active: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds, then slice open a rift on the largest group of champions dealing the Passive's bonus damage to all enemies within. Enemies have their Attack Speed slowed by @ASSlow*100@% while allies within gain @BonusAS*100@% Attack Speed, both rapidly decaying over @BuffDebuffDuration@ seconds.

ability.name: Mega Time Kick
ability.desc:
Kick a ball at the current target that deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. On impact, the ball has a 100% Lucky chance to bounce to a new target dealing @ModifiedBounceDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. These bounces can trigger additional bounces, but the odds halve with each bounce.

Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

ability.name: Temporal Shot
ability.desc:
Active: Fire a blast at the current target that deals @TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage. Every @TakedownsToDrone@ takedowns, gain a drone that deals @ModifiedDroneDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to the current target on cast.
(Total Takedowns: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Ezreal_Takedowns@)

ability.name: Shield of Daybreak
ability.desc: Gain <TFTBonus>@ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%)</TFTBonus> Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. Bash the current target, dealing <magicDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%)</magicDamage> magic damage and stunning them for @StunDuration@ seconds.

ability.name: Paddle Star
ability.desc: Fire a paddle star at the current target, dealing <magicDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> magic damage to the first target hit and <magicDamage>@ModifiedSecondaryDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> to others it passes through. When the missile reaches its destination, redirect it to a distant enemy, increasing its speed and repeating the damage. This redirect can occur @NumRedirects@ times.

ability.name: Pale Cascade
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal @ModifiedBonusDamageToAttacks@ (%i:scaleAP%) bonus magic damage.

Active: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield and summon 3 encircling orbs for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. Orbs deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to enemies they pass through, and rotate faster based on Attack Speed.

ability.name: Fracture Reality
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal @ModifiedBaseAttackDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage instead.

Active: Summon @NumClones@ clones that attack alongside for @NumAttacks@ attacks, dealing @CloneDamageMultiplier*100@% damage. For their final attack, clones fire a bolt that deals @ModifiedBoltDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.

ability.name: Accretion
ability.desc:
Deal @TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%)  magic damage to the lowest Health enemy in range and permanently gain @BonusHealthPerCast@ maximum Health. If this kills them, permanently gain @BonusHealthOnKill@ maximum Health instead.

(Current Bonus: +@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_ChoGathBonusHealth@ Health)

ability.name: Dark Matter
ability.desc: Hurl a shard towards the current target, dealing <magicDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> magic damage to the first target it hits. After hitting its initial target or at its final destination, the dagger explodes dealing <magicDamage>@ModifiedSecondaryDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> magic damage to nearby targets.

ability.name: Quantum Clone
ability.desc: Create a clone behind the target with @HPPenalty*100@% reduced max Health and @ManaCostIncrease@ increased Mana cost. The clone inherits its creator's items, stats, and current Health, and can cast Quantum Clone.

ability.name: Screech
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal @ModifiedAADamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) bonus magic damage.

Active: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds and grant allies @BonusAP@% Ability Power for the rest of combat.

TFT17_SummonSpell_Level1.name: Screech
TFT17_SummonSpell_Level1.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal @ModifiedAADamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) bonus magic damage.

Active: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds and grant allies @BonusAP@% Ability Power for the rest of combat.

TFT17_SummonSpell_Level2.name: Sharptail Sweep
TFT17_SummonSpell_Level2.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal @ModifiedAADamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) bonus magic damage.

Active: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds and grant allies @BonusAP@% Ability Power for the rest of combat. Then tailsweep in a semi-circle, dealing @ModifiedSpell2Damage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to enemies hit.

TFT17_SummonSpell_Level3.name: The Bond of the Stars
TFT17_SummonSpell_Level3.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal @ModifiedAADamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) bonus magic damage.

Active: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds and grant allies @BonusAP@% Ability Power for the rest of combat. Then tailsweep in a semi-circle, dealing @ModifiedSpell2Damage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to enemies hit.

Bond of the Stars: The first cast each combat instead ushers in an auroral wave. The wave knocks up and deals @ModifiedUltimateDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to enemies it passes through, and restores @UltimateHeal*100@% max Health to allies.

ability.name: Meep Impact
ability.desc:
Heal @ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) Health over @HealDuration@ seconds. Slam the target, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage and knocking up for @StunDuration@ seconds. The impact creates meepwaves that deal @PercentEffects*100@% of these effects in the target's row.

Meep Bonus: Meeps water Meepsie's flower, increasing all incoming Healing and Shielding by @ModifiedHealingAndShielding@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%).

TFT17_IvernMinionSpellHero.name: The Big Bang
TFT17_IvernMinionSpellHero.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal @ModifiedBonusDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%%i:set14AmpIcon%) bonus magic damage.

Active: Leap to largest group of enemies within @LeapHexRange@ hexes and slam the ground, dealing @DamageTotal@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage in a three hex radius, reduced by @FalloffPerHex*100@% per hex from the epicenter. The closest @EnemiesKnockedUp@ enemies are knocked up for @StunDuration@ seconds.

Meep Bonus: The passive's bonus damage is increased by @BonusDamagePerMeep*100@% per Meep.

ability.name: Indestructible
ability.desc: Gain <TFTBonus>@ModifiedInitialShield@ (%i:scaleAP%)</TFTBonus> Shield. Each second for the next @Duration@ seconds, gain <TFTBonus>@ModifiedShieldPerProc@ (%i:scaleAP%)</TFTBonus> more Shield and deal <magicDamage>@ModifiedDamagePerProc@ (%i:scaleAP%)</magicDamage> magic damage to adjacent enemies. When this ability ends, consume the remaining Shield and heal for <scaleHealth>@HealRefund*100@%</scaleHealth> of its value.

ability.name: Stellar Ricochet
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks bounce to strike @AttackNumEnemies@ times, dealing @PassivePercentReducedDamage*100@% reduced damage per target hit and leaving a Feather behind the final target.

Active: Gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed for @Duration@ seconds. At the end, recall all Feathers split between the closest @RecallFeatherTargets@ enemies, dealing @TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage each.

ability.name: Collateral Damage
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks fire @NumProjectiles@ projectiles in a cone that deal @ModifiedPassiveDamage@ (%i:TFTBaseAD%) physical damage each.

Active: Fire an explosive shell that deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to the target, and @ModifiedSecondaryDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage to adjacent enemies.

ability.name: Tounge Lash
ability.desc:
Passive: Once per combat after dropping below @HPThreshold*100@% Health, gain Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds equal to @PercentHealingToShield*100@% of healing received this combat.

Active: Heal @ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%), then tongue lash all enemies within two hexes dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%%i:scaleHealth%) magic damage.

ability.name: Divine Scythe
ability.desc: Gain <TFTBonus>@Durability*100@%</TFTBonus> Durability for @Duration@ seconds, healing <scaleHealth>@ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleAP%)</scaleHealth> over the duration. Afterwards, slash forward in a line, dealing <physicalDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%)</physicalDamage> physical damage to enemies hit and knocking them up for @KnockupDuration@ second.

ability.name: Temporal Core
ability.desc: Sell Core to gain @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Timebreaker_NumEXP@ XP

ability.name: Harbinger of The End
ability.desc:
Passive: Swords fly out in a grid dealing @TotalGridDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage to enemies they hit.

Active: Launch @NumSwords@ swords into the air and gain @Durability*100@% Durability. When they land, they deal @TotalSwordAoEDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage to enemies they hit in a @HexRange@-hex range.

ability.name: Upheaval
ability.desc: Heal @TotalHealing@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%), then briefly knock up adjacent enemies and deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.

ability.name: Advanced Defences
ability.desc: Gain <TFTBonus>@ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%)</TFTBonus> Shield and <TFTBonus>@Durability*100@%</TFTBonus> Durability for @Duration@ seconds. Over the duration, deal <physicalDamage>@ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%)</physicalDamage> physical damage each second to enemies in a cone.

ability.name: Dark Form
ability.desc:
Passive: Heal for @OmnivampPercent*100@% of Ability damage.

Active: Transform into Dark Form for @Duration@ seconds, gaining @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for the duration. While in Dark Form, tether the @NumEnemies@ nearest enemies, dealing @ModifiedDamagePerSecond@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage per second to each one.

At the end of the transfomation, deal @ModifiedFinalDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to all tethered enemies.

ability.desc: <spellPassive>Passive:</spellPassive> Attacks splash in a cone behind the target.

ability.name: Tome of Traits
ability.desc: Drag this Tome to the Shop to open an Armory full of emblems! You will have 30 seconds to choose.

ability.name: Gravitational Collapse
ability.desc:
A miniature black hole created by a supernova.

Gains max health equal to @TOOLTIPDarkStarPercentHP@% of ally Dark Star Health.

augments.name: Ekko's Boon
augments.desc: Gain the Anomaly, an item which grants units a powerful evolution depending on their role. Gain @NumRemovers_TOOLTIPONLY@ Magnetic Removers.

augments.name: Soraka's Boon
augments.desc: Your team gains @HealthPerTacHealth@ Health for each missing player health. At the start of each player combat, gain an additional @Heal@ player health.

augments.name: Anima Commander
augments.desc: Gain a Briar, a Jinx, and an Illaoi. Increase your current and max player Health by @PlayerHealth@.

augments.name: Aurelion Sol's Boon
augments.desc:
Choose 1 of @NumQuestOptions_TOOLTIPONLY@ quests to prove yourself to Aurelion Sol.

Chosen Quest: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_AurelionSolGodAugment@

augments.name: Your team gains @SmallQuestADAP@ Attack Damage and Ability Power.
augments.desc: Your team gains @SmallQuestADAP@ Attack Damage and Ability Power.
augments.en_name: Your team gains @SmallQuestADAP@ Attack Damage and Ability Power.

augments.name: Heat Death
augments.desc: Gain a Mordekaiser. Your strongest Mordkaiser becomes a Magic Fighter with a slowly growing aura that deals damage over time.

augments.name: Invader Zed
augments.desc:
Gain a Bloodthirster. On Stage @StageNum@-@RoundNum@, gain a Zed. After receiving Zed, he can then appear in your shops.

Zed is a 5-cost Attack Fighter that creates clones of himself.

augments.name: Ahri's Boon
augments.desc: Your team gains @ADAPPerLevel@% Attack Damage and Ability Power per level. Gain @XP@ XP each round for the rest of the game.

augments.name: Boon of Resurrection
augments.desc: The first time you would be eliminated, instead remain at 1 Health

augments.name: Divine Amendment
augments.desc:
Arbiters add a second effect to their law.
Gain a Leona and a Zoe.

augments.name: Stellar Combo
augments.desc: Gain an Aatrox. Your strongest Aatrox becomes an Attack Fighter with an ability that swaps between three different strikes.

augments.name: Yasuo's Share The Spotlight
augments.desc: Yasuo's hexes also affect adjacent units at @Effectiveness*100@% effectiveness.

augments.name: Termeepnal Velocity
augments.desc: Gain a Poppy. Your strongest Poppy becomes a ranged Attack Caster that flings a high-velocity Meep at her target.

augments.name: The Big Bang
augments.desc: Gain a Meepsie. Your strongest Meepsie becomes a Magic Fighter that leaps to a nearby hex to deal damage in a large radius.

augments.name: Contract Killer
augments.desc: Gain a Pyke. Your strongest Pyke becomes an Attack Fighter, generates gold on team takedown, and gains a reset on-kill Ability.

augments.name: Yasuo's Golden Hex
augments.desc: Paint a Golden Hex. The unit in the hex gains @BonusHealth@ health, @AttackSpeed*100@% attack speed, and drops @Gold@ gold on kill.

augments.name: Thresh's Boon
augments.desc:
Each round, roll a die. Get a bonus based on that roll.


Health: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_ThreshGodAugment_Health@
Attack Speed: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_ThreshGodAugment_AttackSpeed@%

augments.name: Reach for the Stars
augments.desc: Gain a Jax. Your strongest Jax becomes a Magic Fighter that deal bonus magic damage on attack and gains stacking Attack Speed on cast.

augments.name: Sniper's Nest
augments.desc: Snipers gain @DamageAmp@% Damage Amp for each combat fought from the same starting hex, up to @MaxAmp@%. Gain an Ezreal and a Gnar.

augments.name: Apotheotic Forge
augments.desc:
Choose 1 of 4 Divine Artifacts.

Artifacts are more powerful items with a unique effect.

augments.name: Shepherd's Song
augments.desc: On Stage @StageNum@-@RoundNum@, gain a Sona and a Shepherd Emblem.

augments.name: Evelynn's Boon
augments.desc: Your team gains @Durability*100@% Durability. Lose an additional @HP@ Tactician health when you lose combat.

augments.name: Bonk!
augments.desc: Gain a Nasus. Your strongest Nasus becomes an Attack Fighter with a single target Ability that gets stronger with each kill.

augments.name: Kayle's Boon
augments.desc: Upgrade a random completed item to Radiant.

augments.name: Yasuo's Boon
augments.desc: Increase the power of Yasuo's hexes by @Effectiveness*100@%. If you only have 2 hexes, gain @GoldIfTwo@ gold.

augments.name: Boon of the Scrapper
augments.desc:
Combat start: Up to @NumComponents@ components temporarily turn into completed items. Gain @NumRemovers@ removers and a salvager.

Salvagers allow you to break completed items into components

augments.name: Self Destruct
augments.desc: Gain a Gragas. Your strongest Gragas becomes a Magic Fighter with a massive explosion, but also damages himself.

augments.name: Varus's Boon
augments.desc: Your team gains @Health@ health for each total star level in your army, and your 5 cost odds increase by @PercentIncrease@%.

augments.name: Blood Price
augments.desc: Gain @Health@ health. Your rightmost shop slot costs health instead of gold.

augments.name: Lift Off
augments.desc:
At the start of each round, if the combined Health of all your unique Brawlers is high enough, gain a reward and increase the threshold (up to four times). Gain a Cho'Gath and a Gragas.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_Weightlifting_RewardName@@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_Weightlifting_CurrentHealth@ / @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_Weightlifting_MaxHealth@

augments.name: Heart of the Swarm
augments.desc:
All 3-star units now count towards Swarmling power. After 3-starring @Num3StarUnits@ units and reaching level @LevelRequirement@, Primordian summons the APEX PRIMORDIAN. Gain a Briar, Bel'veth, and Rek'sai.

3-Star Units: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_PrimordianPrismaticAugment_TotalStarredUnits@ / @Num3StarUnits@

Levels: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_PrimordianPrismaticAugment_TotalLevel@ / @LevelRequirement@

augments.name: U.R.F
augments.desc: Gain a Spatula. Champions holding Spatula or Frying Pan items gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed and @ManaRegen@ Mana Regen.

augments.name: Augment Wheel
augments.desc: Gain either: 1 random Prismatic augment, 2 random Gold augments, or 3 random Silver augments and @SilverGold@ gold.

augments.name: Silver Augment
augments.desc: Open an armory of 3 Silver augments and choose one.

augments.name: Trade Sector
augments.desc: Gain a free Shop reroll every round. Gain @Gold@ gold.

augments.name: Shimmerscale Essence
augments.desc:
Gain a Mogul's Mail. In @combatnum@ rounds, gain a Gamblers Blade.

These items give gold as well as combat power.

augments.name: Starter Kit
augments.desc:
Gain a 4-cost champion, a 2-star 1-cost champion that shares a trait with them, and @Gold@ gold.

At the start of the next @FutureChampionCount@ stages, gain that 4-cost champion again.

augments.name: Augment Rerolls
augments.desc: You get +@ExtraRolls@ Augment rerolls for all future augment choices. Gain @Gold@ gold.

augments.name: Level Up!
augments.desc: When you buy XP, gain an additional @XP@. Gain @InitialXP@ immediately.

augments.name: Augment Rerolls
augments.desc: You get +@ExtraRolls@ Augment rerolls for all future augment choices. Gain @Gold@ gold.

augments.name: Prismatic Augment
augments.desc: Open an armory of 3 Prismatic augments and choose one.

augments.name: Gold Augment
augments.desc: Open an armory of 3 Gold augments and choose one.

augments.name: Precise Smithing
augments.desc:
Reforging items and Artifacts grants an anvil of the same value instead. Gain @NumComponents@ component and @NumReforger@ reforger now, and @StageReforger@ reforgers every stage.

Includes components and Radiant Items, but does not affect Emblems or Tactician's Items.

augments.name: Call to Chaos
augments.desc:
Gain a powerful and random reward.

Reward: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT11_Augment_CallToChaos@

augments.name: At What Cost
augments.desc: Immediately go to level @Level@ and gain @XP@ XP. You don't get to choose your future augments.

augments.name: The Golden Egg
augments.desc: Gain a golden egg that hatches in @EggTurns@ turns for a huge amount of loot. Winning player combat speeds up the hatch timer by an extra turn.

augments.name: Retribution
augments.desc:
Gain @ItemCount@ Hands of Justice. Allies equipped with Hand of Justice gain Precision.

{{TFT_Keyword_Precision}}

augments.name: Min-Max
augments.desc:
Gain a Golden Item Remover and @NumItems@ random components.

Golden Item Remover is a Magnetic Remover with infinite uses.

augments.name: Arcane Viktor-y
augments.desc:
After @FirstStunSeconds@ seconds of combat, stun the enemy team for @StunDuration@ seconds. Repeat this after @SecondStunSeconds@ seconds of combat.

TFT Macao Open, 2024

augments.name: Epic Rolldown
augments.desc:
When you reach Level 8, gain @NumRerolls@ Shop rerolls.

Runeterra Reforged Championship, 2023

augments.name: Max Build
augments.desc:
Gain @RerollCount@ free Shop rerolls. On Stage 4-5 and 6-2, gain a Champion Duplicator.

Galaxies Championship, 2020

augments.name: Firesale
augments.desc: Each round, steal a random @CostLimit@-cost or lower champion from the shop. Gain @Gold@ gold.

augments.name: Spreading Roots
augments.desc: Gain @NumOfEmblems@ random Emblems and @Gold@ gold.

augments.name: Tiny Titans
augments.desc: Increase your current and max player health by @heal@.

augments.name: Survivor
augments.desc: Gain @InitialGold@ gold. After @PlayersDead@ players are eliminated, gain @Gold@ more gold.

augments.name: Small Grab Bag
augments.desc: Gain @NumComponents@ random item components.

augments.name: Warlord's Honor
augments.desc: Every round, your team gain @Stats@% Attack Damage and Ability Power. Champions start with @StartingStacks@ stack of this effect, and can stack up to @MaxStacks@ times.

augments.name: Team Building
augments.desc:
Gain a Lesser Champion Duplicator. Gain another after @PlayerCombatNum@ player combats.

This item allows you to copy a 3-cost or less champion.

augments.name: Tactician's Kitchen
augments.desc: Gain a random Emblem. After @TurnDelay@ rounds, gain a Tactician's Cape.

augments.name: Hustler
augments.desc:
You no longer gain interest but gain @Gold@ gold at the start of every player combat round. Gain @InitialGold@ gold now.

Interest is extra gold you gain per 10g saved.

augments.name: Band of Thieves II+
augments.desc: Gain @NumGloves@ Thief's Gloves. After @DelayTurns@ player combats, gain another.

augments.name: Giant and Mighty
augments.desc: Your team becomes large, gaining @FlatHealth@ Health and @PercentHealth*100@% max Health.

augments.name: Cybernetic Implants
augments.desc: Allies holding an item gain @HP@ Health and @AD*100@% Attack Damage. Gain a B.F. Sword.

augments.name: Replication
augments.desc: Choose 1 of 3 components. For the next @RoundsOfBonusItems@ rounds, gain a copy of that component.

augments.name: Crash Test Dummies
augments.desc: Gain @Numdummies@ Training Dummies. Combat start: Your Training Dummies launch themselves towards a group of enemies and Stun them for @stun@ seconds.

augments.name: Lucky Gloves+
augments.desc: Thief's Gloves will always give your champions recommended items. Gain @NumGloves@ Sparring Gloves now, then another after @DelayTurns@ player combats.

augments.name: Dummify
augments.desc: Lose all champions on your board and bench. Gain a Training Dummy with @HealthPercent@% of their combined health. The dummy gains @HPPerStage@ Health per stage. Gain a non-Tank 2-star @ChampCost@-cost champion.

augments.name: Patience is a Virtue
augments.desc: Each round, gain @FreeRerolls@ free rerolls if you did not buy a champion last round.

augments.name: Deadlier Caps
augments.desc: Gain a Rabadon's Deathcap. Rabadon's Deathcaps permanently gain @AP@% Ability Power whenever their holders score a takedown.

augments.name: Tiny, but Deadly
augments.desc: Your team becomes small, gaining @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed and Movement Speed.

augments.name: Augmented Power
augments.desc: Your next augment is one tier higher.

augments.name: Urf's Grab Bag
augments.desc: Gain @NumSpatulas@ Spatula, @NumComponents@ random components, and @NumGold@ gold.

augments.name: Baron's Lair
augments.desc:
Gain a random Tank item. After @StartSeconds@ seconds of combat, your team gains @Stats@% bonus Attack Damage and Ability Power every second for the rest of combat.

TFT Paris Open, 2025
